MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Defendant Albay Construction Company's motion for summary judgment. Prior to the hearing plaintiff informed the Court that Mr. Stainbrook's deposition did take place on September 1 and he did provide testimony that would support an opposition to defendant's motion for summary judgment. The Court adopted its tentative ruling and ordered the motion continued to September 15, 2010 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 220. Plaintiff will have until September 8 to file opposition papers and defendant will have until September 13 to file reply papers. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =(220/HEK)
